title: Kerry Kaukinen
content:
People.ContactEmail kkaukinen@mccarthy.ca
- British Columbia, 2015
- Dalhousie University
Kerry Kaukinen is an associate in our Business Law Group in Vancouver. Her practice focuses on environmental, regulatory and aboriginal law.
Kerry has experience advising clients in a range of industries particularly mining and energy. She regularly advises clients on project development, permitting and environmental assessment and regulatory compliance. Kerry also has significant litigation experience and has appeared before various courts in British Columbia and the Yukon and before the British Columbia Environmental Appeal Board.
Prior to joining the firm, Kerry practiced at a leading Canadian national firm and completed a secondment with a major international mining company.
Kerry holds a BA from Concordia University and her JD from Dalhousie University. She is a member of the Canadian Bar Association, the Law Society of British Columbia, and the Law Society of Yukon.

- Publication B.C. Court of Appeal finds mineral tenure regime inconsistent with UNDRIP May 21, 2026
